nodes.name: obscura-ai/obscura
nodes.description: Synthetic data generation platform for ML training using photorealistic image/video synthesis with automatic annotation.

nodes.name: chainyo/claude-task-master
nodes.description: AI-powered project planning and task management system with recursive decomposition, DAG dependency tracking, and artifact management.

nodes.name: eyaltoledano/claude-task-master
nodes.description: Original Claude Task Master repository by Eyal Toledo.

nodes.name: anthropic/claude-ads
nodes.description: Official Anthropic framework for AI-powered advertising content generation across multiple platforms with brand compliance and safety checks.

nodes.name: agentic-stack/agentic-stack
nodes.description: Modular, composable frameworks for AI agent development and orchestration, emphasizing interoperability and transparency.

nodes.name: agentic-stack/tools
nodes.description: Official tools collection for agentic-stack ecosystem.

nodes.name: agentic-stack/memory
nodes.description: Memory backend adapters for vector stores, databases, and file systems.

nodes.name: agentic-stack/orchestrator
nodes.description: Workflow engine for multi-agent coordination.

nodes.name: agentic-stack/protocol
nodes.description: Agent communication protocol specification.

nodes.name: Eyal Toledo
nodes.description: Creator of original Claude Task Master (eyaltoledano).

nodes.name: chainyo
nodes.description: Maintainer of chainyo/claude-task-master fork with modifications.

nodes.name: Teknium
nodes.description: Contributor to Hermes Agent and skill documentation.

nodes.name: Nous Research
nodes.description: Organization behind Hermes Agent and Hermes AI models.

nodes.name: Anthropic
nodes.description: Creator of Claude AI and the claude-ads framework.

nodes.name: Python
nodes.description: Primary programming language for Hermes Agent and obscura SDK.

nodes.name: TypeScript
nodes.description: Language used in agentic-stack core and TaskMaster.

nodes.name: Claude API
nodes.description: Anthropic's API powering all four research projects.

nodes.name: OpenAI API
nodes.description: LLM provider supported by agentic-stack.

nodes.name: OpenRouter
nodes.description: LLM aggregation service supported by Hermes and agentic-stack.

nodes.name: Diffusion Models
nodes.description: Core generative AI technology used by Obscura for image synthesis.

nodes.name: Neural Rendering
nodes.description: Hybrid rendering technique combining PBR with neural enhancement.

nodes.name: Retrieval-Augmented Generation
nodes.description: Pattern referenced across projects for knowledge retrieval.

nodes.name: JSON
nodes.description: Data interchange format used in TaskMaster storage, API payloads, and skill files.

nodes.name: YAML
nodes.description: Configuration format for Hermes config, brand profiles, and scene definitions.

nodes.name: Neo4j
nodes.description: Graph database option for agentic-stack GraphMemory.

nodes.name: Redis
nodes.description: In-memory data store used for shared state and caching.

nodes.name: Docker
nodes.description: Containerization platform referenced in tooling.

nodes.name: Kubernetes
nodes.description: Orchestration platform for scaling Hermes deployments.

nodes.name: Terraform
nodes.description: Infrastructure as Code tool.

nodes.name: AWS
nodes.description: Cloud provider for Obscura and Hermes hosting.

nodes.name: Google Cloud Platform
nodes.description: Cloud provider with memory and ML services.

nodes.name: HuggingFace
nodes.description: Model hub and inference platform.

nodes.name: Weights & Biases
nodes.description: ML experiment tracking referenced in research.

nodes.name: Prometheus
nodes.description: Metrics collection and monitoring.

nodes.name: OpenTelemetry
nodes.description: Observability standards for distributed tracing.

nodes.name: Vector Databases
nodes.description: Chroma, Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant for long-term semantic memory.

nodes.name: Platform APIs
nodes.description: Google Ads, Facebook Marketing, LinkedIn, Twitter APIs referenced in claude-ads.

nodes.name: Recursive Decomposition
nodes.description: Breaking large tasks into smaller subtasks until implementable (TaskMaster pattern).

nodes.name: DAG-based Scheduling
nodes.description: Directed acyclic graph for dependency tracking and topological execution order (TaskMaster).

nodes.name: Tool-Decorator Pattern
nodes.description: Decorating tools with metadata for LLM-driven discovery and invocation (agentic-stack).

nodes.name: Memory Abstraction Layer
nodes.description: Unified interface for multiple memory backends (STM, LTM, graph) (agentic-stack).

nodes.name: Reflection Loop Pattern
nodes.description: Agents evaluate their own outputs and self-correct through iterative cycles (agentic-stack).

nodes.name: Multi-Agent Collaboration
nodes.description: Structured protocols for agent communication and coordination (agentic-stack).

nodes.name: Configuration-as-Code
nodes.description: Datasets and projects defined via version-controllable YAML/JSON (Obscura, TaskMaster).

nodes.name: Lazy Evaluation
nodes.description: Scene definitions realized only on explicit render, enabling rapid iteration (Obscura).

nodes.name: Composable Primitives
nodes.description: Simple objects/materials combined into complex scenes (Obscura).

nodes.name: Deterministic Seeding
nodes.description: Reproducible generation via seeded randomness (Obscura, important for debugging).

nodes.name: Domain Randomization
nodes.description: Extensive randomization for robust model generalization (Obscura).

nodes.name: Systematic Prompt Engineering
nodes.description: Template-based, few-shot, chain-of-thought prompts (claude-ads, TaskMaster).

nodes.name: Multi-Stage Generation Pipeline
nodes.description: Sequential stages: Strategy → Draft → Refine → Validate (claude-ads).

nodes.name: Safety & Ethics by Design
nodes.description: Built-in content filtering, compliance checks, brand safety (claude-ads).

nodes.name: Synthetic Data Generation
nodes.description: Core capability of Obscura for ML training data creation.

nodes.name: AI Project Planning
nodes.description: TaskMaster's purpose: transforming goals into task trees.

nodes.name: Ad Campaign Generation
nodes.description: End-to-end ad creation from brief to multi-platform deployment (claude-ads).

nodes.name: Modular Agent Framework
nodes.description: Building blocks for creating autonomous AI agents (agentic-stack).

nodes.name: Privacy by Design
nodes.description: Synthetic data contains no real PII (Obscura value proposition).

nodes.name: Directed Acyclic Graph
nodes.description: Data structure for task dependencies and execution ordering.

nodes.name: Artifact Tracking
nodes.description: Linking generated files to specific tasks for traceability.

nodes.name: Brand Profile
nodes.description: Structured YAML defining voice, guidelines, target audiences for consistent ad generation.
